summary: Quick Replies feature VERIFIED WORKING. Buttons appear correctly after Mira responds. The buttons showing ('See more options', 'Why these?', 'Send to Concierge') are generated based on product detection logic, not pillar-specific logic.

issues: Quick Replies show product-specific buttons ('See more options', 'Why these?') instead of pillar-specific buttons ('See party ideas', 'Find cakes') when products are detected - this is BY DESIGN but may not match user expectations

quick_replies_rendering.visibility: PASS - Quick Replies container visible: true
quick_replies_rendering.click_functionality: PASS - Clicking 'See more options' sends follow-up query

console_verification.quick_replies_generated: PASS - [QUICK REPLIES] Generated 3 suggestions for pillar: celebrate
console_verification.mode_system: PASS - Mode: PLAN | Clarify only: true

code_analysis.generateQuickReplies_function: WORKING - Returns product-specific replies when hasProducts=true or hasServices=true
code_analysis.pillar_specific_replies_defined: YES - celebrate pillar has 'See party ideas', 'Find cakes', 'Send to Concierge'
code_analysis.priority_logic: Product replies take precedence over pillar replies (lines 66-72 in QuickReplies.jsx)

action_items: OPTIONAL: If business wants pillar-specific Quick Replies to show instead of product-specific ones, modify generateQuickReplies() to prioritize pillar when pillar matches 'celebrate', 'travel', etc. regardless of product count
critical_code_review_comments: generateQuickReplies() logic: Returns product-specific buttons when ANY products/services exist, overriding pillar-specific options. Consider if pillar should take precedence in certain cases like 'celebrate' pillar.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Replies feature is working. The buttons that appear depend on business logic in generateQuickReplies() - when products are detected, it shows generic product buttons; when no products, it shows pillar-specific buttons. User expected 'See party ideas' but got 'See more options' because products were detected.
